text: Thinking of you and sending a little love your way.
Life is better with people like you in it. Hope you know that.
Just wanted to reach out across the miles and say hello.
Just wanted to brighten your day with a hello!
Wishing you sunshine, good coffee, and easy days.
Sending good vibes your way — hope they arrive on time!
Sending this from wherever I am to wherever you are. Some distances don't really matter.
Every time I look at this photo I think of you. Figured I'd make it official.
I sent you a postcard. Now you have to send one back. Those are the rules.
This is proof that I still know your address. Impressed? You should be.
